gamelift.fleet.locationcapacity.CfnAbout:
Current resource capacity settings in a specified fleet or location. The location value might refer to a fleet's remote location or its home Region. 

 **Related actions** 

 [DescribeFleetCapacity](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/gamelift/latest/apireference/API_DescribeFleetCapacity.html) | [DescribeFleetLocationCapacity](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/gamelift/latest/apireference/API_DescribeFleetLocationCapacity.html) | [UpdateFleetCapacity](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/gamelift/latest/apireference/API_UpdateFleetCapacity.html)

gamelift.fleet.locationcapacity.DesiredE.Description: The number of Amazon EC2 instances you want to maintain in the specified fleet location. This value must fall between the minimum and maximum size limits.

gamelift.fleet.locationcapacity.MaxSize.Description: The maximum number of instances that are allowed in the specified fleet location. If this parameter is not set, the default is 1.

gamelift.fleet.locationcapacity.MinSize.Description: The minimum number of instances that are allowed in the specified fleet location. If this parameter is not set, the default is 0.
